figures.caption: FIG. 2. Gaussian preferred-spacing model (18) with I = 2, A = 2, µ = 0.5, and g0 ∈ {3, 5, 8}. (a) Interaction potential Jg. (b) Exact stationary current J(ρ) (solid) vs. mean-field (dashed black); the peak density ρ⋆ is annotated. The mean-field prediction is independent of g0, while the exact formula captures the shift of ρ⋆ with preferred spacing.

FIG. 1. Stationary current J(ρ) for model (16). Solid lines: exact formula (12); dashed lines: mean-field (3). (a) Fixed I = 2, J ∈ {−1,−0.5, 0, 0.5, 1}; at J = 0 the two curves coincide. (b) Fixed J = 0.5, I ∈ {1, 2, 3, 4}; dashed lines of the same color show the corresponding mean-field curves.
